name: Empty state

body.note: Provides context and tells user what to do next. No technical jargon.

illustration.note: Use illustration only. Never icons or images.

action.note: Directional CTA. e.g. Create order, Upload media. Avoid leaving without action.

spacing.note: Text width must not exceed 960px (approx 60 chars) for readability

usage_rules.rule: Illustration only — no icons or images
usage_rules.detail: Only use illustrations in the empty state. Never use icons or photographs as the visual element.
Avoid empty states without actionable CTAs. Guide the user on what to do next.
Body text must be coherent, solution-oriented, and free of technical terms.
Constrain text width to 960px for readability, even if the container is wider.
Action labels should clearly describe what happens. e.g. Create order, Upload media. Not OK or Continue.
Headline and body must use sentence case.

accessibility.aria_label: Describe what the empty area represents

confidence_blockers: If ticket uses an icon as the visual in an empty state, flag — must use illustration.
If ticket leaves empty state without any action, flag with warning.
If body text contains technical error messages, flag and suggest plain language.

embedding_text: Empty state component. No data zero state blank state no results page not found inactivity. Has headline body illustration optional action. Illustration only never icons or images. Directional action CTA required. No technical jargon. Max 960px text width. Sentence case.
